title: [lg] Okutandikira ku Ndwadde Ezisasaana
content:
[lg] Endwadde ezisasaana ze ndwadde ezireetebwa obuwuka, virusi, fungi, oba parasites.
Endwadde zino zisobola okusasaana amangu mu kisibo ky'ensolo oba mu bibinja by'enkoko.
Okuzuula endwadde nga zikyali zitoono kisobola okulokola obulamu n'okwongera ku bibala by'obulimi.
Media: Animation y'edakiika 1: “Endwadde Ezisasaana ze ziruwa?”
sms_text:
[lg] Endwadde ezisasaana ze ndwadde ezireetebwa obuwuka, virusi, fungi, oba parasites.

Okuzuula endwadde nga zikyali zitoono kisobola okulokola obulamu n'okwongera ku bibala by'obulimi.
Media: Animation y'edakiika 1: “Endwadde Ezisasaana ze ziruwa?”

title: [lg] Endwadde Ezisasaana Bitya
content:
[lg] Endwadde zisasaana okuyita mu kukwatagana butereevu, ebifo eby'obutaffaali ebitali birongoofu, emmere oba amazzi agali mu bucaafu, ebiwuka, n'ebikozesebwa.
Ensolo ezirwadde zisobola okwongera ku kusasaana kw'endwadde mu ziri obulamu amangu nnyo.
Infographic: Engeri endwadde gye zisasaana (ensolo ↔ ensolo, emmere, amazzi, ebikozesebwa).

Ensolo ezirwadde zisobola okwongera ku kusasaana kw'endwadde mu ziri obulamu amangu nnyo.
Infographic: Engeri endwadde gye zisasaana (ensolo ↔ ensolo, emmere, amazzi, ebikozesebwa).

title: [lg] Obubonero n’Ebimenyetso Ebisinga Okulabika
content:
[lg] Omusujja, okufiirwa ku kyokulya, okukooka, okuddukana olubuto, ebiwundu, okufa amangu.
Ensolo okwawula okuva ku ndala kye kimenyetso eky'okulabula.
Activity: “Noonya akabonero” okuzuula ebimenyetso okuva ku bifaananyi.

title: [lg] Endwadde Ezisasaana Ezimanyiddwa (Ebyokulabirako)
content:
[lg] Anthrax, foot-and-mouth disease, brucellosis, rabies, PPR, Newcastle disease.
Buli ndwadde erina obubonero bwayo obw'enjawulo buli mulimi bw’alina okumanya.
Media: Amateeka amalungi ag’eddoboozi ku buli ndwadde.

title: [lg] Okwewala Okusasaana kw’Endwadde
content:
[lg] Longoosa era osaanuuse ebifo ensolo gye zibeera buli kiseera.
Wa ensolo amazzi amalongoofu ag’okunywa.
Weewale okukozesa ebikozesebwa bimu ku nsalo ezirwadde n’ezo eziramu.
Infographic: Olukalala lw'obulongoofu obw'olunaku.

title: [lg] Okukuba Empiso n’Okugoba Obuwuka
content:
[lg] Empiso ziyamba okwewala endwadde ezisasaana.
Okugoba obuwuka kukendeeza ku buwuka mu mubiri era kukendeeza ku kusasaana kw’endwadde.
Goberera enteekateeka y’omusawo w’ensolo buli kiseera.
Media: Vidiyo y’omusawo ku mpiso z’ensolo.

title: [lg] Okusiba mu Kifo Ekyawuliddwa
content:
[lg] Wawula ensolo empya okumala ennaku 10–14 nga tonnaziteeka mu kisibo.
Kuuma ensolo ezirwadde nga ziri zokka okutuusa lwe ziwonye.
Checklist: Engeri y'okuteekawo ekifo eky'okuwawula ensolo.

title: [lg] Endwadde Ezisasaana okuva ku Nsolo okudda ku Muntu
content:
[lg] Endwadde ezimu zisobola okuva ku nsolo okudda ku bantu (nga anthrax, brucellosis, rabies).
Yambala engalo, naaba emikono, yookya ennyama bulungi, era ofumbe amata.
Comic/story: “Lwaki One Health kikulu.”

title: [lg] Okutegeeza n’Okunoonya Obuyambi
content:
[lg] Tegeeza amangu ddala ku kufa okw’amangu oba ebimenyetso ebitali bya bulijjo.
Obuyambi bw’omusawo w’ensolo bwangu bukendeeza ku kufiirwa n’okukuuma obulamu bw’ekisibo.
Activity: “Ddi lwe nnina okuyita omusawo?” quiz.

Kiyamba okuzuula endwadde nga zikyali zitoono.

title: [lg] Enyanjula ku Kulabirira Ensolo
content:
[lg] Ennyonyola: Okulabirira ensolo = ebikolwa eby’olunaku n’olunaku okukakasa obulamu, obuweerero, n'obulungi bw’ensolo.
Okulabirira obulungi kukakasa emmere entuufu, obutonde obulungi, obulamu obulungi, n’okukwata ensolo mu ngeri ey’ekisa.
Media: Animation ey’enyanjula ku 'Okulabirira ensolo kye ki?'

title: [lg] Enkolagana wakati w’Okulabirira n’Obulungi bw’Ensolo
content:
[lg] Okulabirira ensolo kuyamba okukuuma obulungi bwazo nga kutuukiriza ebyetaago byazo eby’omubiri n’eby’omwoyo.
Okulabirira obubi = obulungi obubi; okubuusaawo kuleeta okunyigirizibwa n’endwadde.
Activity: Noonya ebizibu by’obulungi ebiva ku kulabirira obubi.

content:
[lg] Buli kika ky’ensolo n’ensolo buli emu erina ebyetaago byayo eby’enjawulo (emmere, obusulo, ekifo, n’okubeera wamu n’endala).
Tegeera obubonero obulaga ebyetaago ebitatuukiriziddwa.

title: [lg] Emmere n’Okuliisa
content:
[lg] Wa ensolo amazzi amalongoofu, emmere etuufu, n’enteekateeka y’okuliisa etakyuka.
Weewale okuwa emmere esukka oba entono nnyo. Kyusa emmere okusinziira ku kika, emyaka, n’ekigendererwa.
Media: Vidiyo ku ngeri y’okuliisa ensolo mu ngeri entuufu.

title: [lg] Obusulo n’Obutonde bw’Ensolo
content:
[lg] Obusulo bulina okukuuma ensolo okuva ku nkuba, empewo, ebbugumu, n’abalabe.
Kakasa empewo entuufu, ekifo ekimala, n’obulongoofu.
Infographic: Enteekateeka y’obusulo obulungi bw’ensolo.

content:
[lg] Laba ensolo buli lunaku okuzuula enkyukakyuka mu nneeyisa, okuliisa, oba ebiwundu.
Okulabirira kwa bulijjo kuberamu okunaaza, okutema ebigere, okulongoosa, n’okuwummuza.

Enkolagana ennungi eyongera ku bibala n’obulungi bwazo.

Bayamba okutumbula okulabirira obulungi, okwewala endwadde, n’okutendeka.

Ekigendererwa: Okukakasa obukuumi, obulungi, n’okwewala okunyigirizibwa mu kutambula.

content:
[lg] Ensolo zirina okuba ennungi, zisobole okutambula, era zilabiddwa omusawo w’ensolo.
Wa ensolo amazzi n’okuwummula nga tonaziteeka mu mmotoka.

Kwata ensolo mu mpola—tezikubiddwa oba okukuba enduulu.

content:
[lg] Emmotoka zirina okuba n’empewo entuufu era zikuume ensolo okuva ku mbeera y’obudde embi.
Partitions ziyamba okuziyiza ebiwundu era ne ziwawula ensolo okusinziira ku kika oba obunene.

Wa ensolo amazzi n’emmere mu lugendo oluwanvu (> essaawa 8).

Bagoberere amateeka g’eggwanga agakwata ku bulungi bw’ensolo.

title: [lg] Okutegeera Obulungi bw’Ensolo
content:
[lg] Obulungi bw’ensolo = engeri ensolo gye zikwatamu mu mubiri n’amagezi mu mbeera gye zibeeramu.
Eddembe Ettaano: eddembe okuva ku njala n’ennyonta, obutali bwangu, obulumi n’ebiwundu, okutya, n’okulaga enneeyisa ey’obutonde.
Obulungi obulungi = omubiri omulamu, embeera ennungi mu magezi, n’obusobozi okwetegekera embeera.
Media: Vidiyo ey’enyanjula erimu animation z’okulabirira ensolo.
Quiz: Tuuma ebbiri ku Ddembe Ettaano.

title: [lg] Amateeka agafuga Obulungi bw’Ensolo kye ki?
content:
[lg] Amateeka agafuga obulungi bw’ensolo gategeeza eddembe n’okukuuma ensolo bye zifuna wansi w’amateeka.
Gakakasa nti ensolo zikolebwa mu ngeri ey’ekisa, gakuuma okuva ku bukambwe, era gakubiriza obuvunaanyizibwa mu kulabirira ensolo.
Media: Vidiyo ey’enyanjula erimu okwogera wakati w’omulimi ne veterinary.
Quiz: Lwaki amateeka g’obulungi bw’ensolo makulu?

Amateeka g’obusuubuzi mu bitundu galagira okutambuza n’okutta ensolo mu ngeri ey’ekisa.

Definition: Okukebera embeera y’ensolo okutwaliza awamu n’ebipimo by’omubiri.
Purpose: Okukebera obulamu, obulungi bw’ensolo, okuzuula obulwadde, n’okulondoola okujjanjaba.

Sooka okulaba enneeyisa y’ensolo nga tonnagikwata.
Kozesa enkwata ey’eddoboozi, ey’omubiri, oba eddagala bwe kiba kyetaagisa.
Enkwata ennyonjo ekendeeza ku buvune era eyongera ku butuufu.

title: [lg] Enkola z’Obuntu mu Euthanasia
content:
[lg] Okusalawo ku euthanasia kulina okussa mu ttala obulungi bw’ensolo, obukuumi bw’abantu, n’okukwatirwa ekisa.
Laba obubonero bw’okubonaabona, ekisuubizo ky’okuwona (prognosis), n’omutindo gw’obulamu.

Okukebera kwa veterinary n’okukkiriza kwa nannyini w’ensolo byetaagisa.

title: [lg] Emitendera gy’Obulungi bw’Ensolo mu Nsi n’Ekitundu

Okukyusa ku mutendera gw’awaka kiyamba okukwatagana n’embeera z’abantu n’ebyenfuna.
Activity: Zuula etteeka ly’obulungi bw’ensolo mu ggwanga lyo.
💬 SMS-Based Microlessons (Offline Learning)
Obubaka bwa SMS buno bufunza ebikulu mu lulimi olwangu eri abayizi abatalina internet. Buli bubaka buli wansi wa characters 480 era bufunwa nga otumye WTS AW1–AW10.
🌍 Localization & Implementation Notes
Ennimi: Lungereza, Luganda, Runyankole, Kiswahili
• Target Audience: Abalimi, abayizi, para-vet, n’abakulembeze b’ekitundu
• Delivery: WTS-LEARN app ne SMS (offline)
• Duration: Ddakiika 3–5 (app), 1–2 (SMS)
• Partners: Bugema University, Ministry of Agriculture, Animal Industry & Fisheries
• Goal: Okutumbula okukwata ensolo mu ngeri ey’obuntu, okwongera ku bivaamu, n’okussa ekitiibwa mu bulamu bwazo.

title: [lg] Okukwata n’Okutereka Vaccines
content:
[lg] Vaccines ziwulira nnyo ebbugumu, ekitangaala, n’okufirizibwa.
Kuuma “cold chain” (2–8°C) okuva mu kkolero okutuuka ku farm.
Toteeka vaccines mu musana oba mu mazzi agafu.
Checklist: Ebikolebwa n’Ebitakolebwa mu kutereka vaccines.

Goberera ebiragiro bya kkampuni n’ebya vet.

title: [lg] Okutegeeza Abantu n’Empisa Ennungi mu Kugemesa
content:
[lg] Kubbiriza abantu okwetaba mu nkola z’okugemesa.
Saasanya amawulire amatuufu—weewale eby’obufu (myths) ku vaccines.
Kakasa obulamu obulungi bw’ensolo n’okuzikwata mu ngeri ennungi nga zigemesebwa.
Video: olugero olw’obuwanguzi okuva mu kitundu ky’ebyalo.
💬 SMS-Based Microlessons (Offline Learning)
Obubaka buno obufunze bwa SMS bufunza ensonga enkulu okuva mu module ya Vaccination eri abalimi abatalina smartphones. Buli bubaka buli wansi wa nnukuta 480 era busobola okufuna nga owaayo code ehambiddwa (okugeza, WTS VAC1–VAC10).
🌍 Localization & Implementation Notes
Ennimi: Lungereza, Luganda, Runyankole, Kiswahili
• Abakozesa abagendereddwamu: Abalimi, para-vets, n’abayizi mu East Africa
• Okutuusa: Pulogulaamu za radio, SMS codes, okutendekebwa kw’abantu mu kitundu & app ya WTS-LEARN
• Okulondoola: Bugema University ekakasa empisa ennungi n’okukwatagana n’obulamu bw’ensolo
• Obudde: Buli ssomo ddakiika 3–5 (app) oba 1–2 (SMS)

title: [lg] Enyanjula ku Kuddukanya Ebiwundu
content:
[lg] Ennyonyola y’ekiwundu: ekintu kyonna ekityoboola obulamu bw’ebitundu by’omubiri.
Okuddukanya ebiwundu = ebikolwa ebiyamba okuwonya n’okwewala obulwadde.
Ebiwundu bikosa obulamu bw’ensolo era biyinza okulaga obutafuga bulungi.
Media: video eraga ebiwundu ebimanyiddwa n’engeri gye bikosa obulamu bw’ensolo.
Quiz: Lwaki okuddukanya ebiwundu kikulu mu bulamu bw’ensolo?
